title: Rpg Musics
description: Ambient music by region (from WorldGuard) in Minecraft.
body:
# RPG MUSICS PLUGIN (1.18.2 - 1.20.4)
## A plugin to make your server immersive like an rpg (using music).
NOTE: You need to use musics from a custom resource-pack for that. Btw, you DONT NEED Optifine or any mods for that, just search how to add sounds to the game using resource-packs.

When the player enters a region with music (a region specified in regions.yml), music from that region will begin playing.

If the music in that region is already playing (in a loop) for the player, when entering that region, nothing happens.

If another song is playing (in a loop) for the player, that song will stop playing and its loop will also stop, and the new song will start playing (in a loop).

If the player leaves the region with music to a region without music, the music will not stop playing, but the loop will end as soon as the music is completed. In other words, the music will play until it ends, and after that it will no longer play for the player. However, if the player returns to a region with music, which has that song as its music, before the current song ends, the loop will not be stopped, and the music will continue playing in a loop for the player.

All that needs to be done is to specify the name of the region, the world name of the region, the name of the song (in texture), the tempo of the song (in ticks), the volume of the sound, and the pitch of the sound.

Plugin version: 1.18+. You can change it (through the source-code) to make it compatible with other older versions, if you want.

Obs: You need WorldGuard and WGRegionEvents (Updated // 1.13-1.20 version), in your plugins folder to use it.

Download WorldGuard from here: [CLICK HERE](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/worldguard/files)

and WGRegionEvents (updated) from here: [CLICK HERE](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/worldguard-region-events-updated.61490/)

+ Extra: All the sounds will be in the "Jukebox/Note Blocks" category instead of "Music" because there isn't a person who doesn't leave this mutated.
